quote: Oakdene made things feel manageable again. The support was practical, respectful, and steady when life felt very heavy.
I did not feel judged. I felt like someone actually listened and helped me work out what to do next.
Oakdene gave me a place to start when everything felt too hard to manage on my own.
Being around others and having somewhere to go helped me get some structure back. It made a bigger difference than I expected.
